signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: USD/JPY at 159.41 — 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains bid; Middle East tensions introduce intervention risk on a break above 160.00. JPY COT LF short −65,309 (crowded carry). Carry dominates until VIX > 25; 160.00 is the key intervention threshold.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD COT LF net long +41,675 vs retail 87% short — institutional vs retail divergence at extreme. HV30 at 8.2%, ATM IV at 9.4%; 25d RR at −0.14: mild put skew. Late-trend caution signal; retail capitulation risk if price extends higher.

signals.title: EUR — G8 Outperformance
signals.text: EUR leads G8 losers (+0.267% GBP vs −0.487% EUR, spread 0.754%); CAD +0.450% outperforming on G8 scorecard. EUR underperforms despite BoE 4.93% vs ECB 2% — 293bp carry advantage for GBP not reflected in price; ECB policy divergence.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
signals.text: GBP/USD at 1.353 — BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% — 0bp GBP carry neutral. GBP LF net long +28,426; AM constructive — positioning aligned with carry read. ATM IV 9.5% near HV; 25d RR flat — options neutral. GBP/USD at 1.353 mid-range; 1.3600 is the next resistance on a continuation.

signals.title: AUD/JPY — Carry
signals.text: AUD/JPY at 113.96 — RBA 4.10% vs BoJ 0.75% — +335bp AUD carry advantage; risk-off unwind risk elevated in risk-off. Cross-asset: S&P 500 +0.80%, VIX 18.7 — normal volatility.

signals.title: NZD/USD — RBNZ vs OIS Divergence
signals.text: NZD/USD at 0.5882 — COT LF net short −17,090 (specs fading a hawkish CB) vs RBNZ hike 100% priced for 27 May. If RBNZ delivers or signals hike, short-squeeze risk is elevated — crowded spec short unwind targets 0.5900+. NZD/USD at 0.5882.
